sounds.text: Short game sound effect: moss golem tears loose and hurls a heavy rock, stone scrape, mossy earth crumble, forceful throw whoosh, clean fantasy SFX, no voice, no music.
Short game sound effect: thrown boulder impacts hard, blunt stone crack, dirt burst, mossy debris scatter, heavy but short game impact, no voice, no music.
Short game sound effect: moss golem sprays jagged stones from the ground, grinding rock burst, pebbles rattling outward, earthy magical force, clean SFX, no voice, no music.
